title: Adding decimals < 1 (hundredths)
topic_path: Module 1: Place value and decimal fractions
Topic D: Adding and subtracting decimals

hints: There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we can solve it.

###Place Value

We can think in terms of hundredths:

$\begin{align}
&\phantom{=}0.76 + 0.61\\\\
&=76\text{ hundredths} + 61\text{ hundredths}\\\\
&=137\text{ hundredths}\\\\
&=1.37
\end{align}$
